- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

logs.name: best-pitch
logs.text:
> 40% of Americans never vote. 75% of Americans never vote in midterms. Of the 60% that do vote, it's basically an even 50-50 split between a relatively moderate/progressive party and a conservative party that has had a rash of criminal convictions related to their election of their current President.

Why is this supposed to be in support of Americans also supporting 'draconian' policies?

>There's a reason why Trevor Noah compares Trump to African dictators.

Who cares about what Trevor

logs.name: jumbo-bridge
logs.text:
hammerhaunts

>Why is this supposed to be in support of Americans also supporting 'draconian' policies?

Because Trump wants to run the country like a dictatorship and almost no one is stopping him. Or if they are, 2 years is too long. Puerto Rico had 2,800 dead, 500 kids are probably going to be permanently separated, not to mention the centuries of terrible precedent his Presidency has set by causing the FBI to fire who he wants, the Congress going along with it, the Russians successfully i

logs.name: leather-designer
logs.text: "Wow, look at all the liberal tears in this thread. You guys are so predictable. 'Trump is a dictator', 'he's ruining the country', blah blah blah. Meanwhile, the economy is booming and America is finally being run by a winner. You can't handle the fact that your precious Obama is gone and a real leader is in charge now. Get over it, snowflakes."

logs.name: jumbo-bridge
logs.text: "@leather-designer, you think the economy is booming for everyone? Have you seen the prices of groceries lately? My granddaughter can't afford to buy food for her kids. And what about those poor families separated at the border? You call that a 'winner'? I call it a heartless, cruel regime that only cares about the rich and powerful. And by the way, I'm not crying, I'm angry. And I won't 'get over it' until we have a president who actually cares about the people, not just his own ego."

logs.name: leather-designer
logs.text: "@jumbo-bridge, oh poor baby, the prices of groceries are too high for your granddaughter? Maybe she should get a better job or stop having kids she can't afford. And those families at the border? They're just trying to sneak into our country and take our jobs. You're just drinking the liberal Kool-Aid and swallowing all the fake news. Trump is a winner and he's making America great again, no matter how much you cry about it. #MAGA"

logs.name: best-pitch
logs.text: "@leather-designer, are you kidding me? You think it's that easy to just 'get a better job' or'stop having kids'? You have no idea what it's like to struggle to make ends meet. And those families at the border are just trying to survive, just like your ancestors probably were when they came to this country. You're just drinking the Trump Kool-Aid and swallowing all the hate. #NotMyPresident"

logs.name: bent-soup
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are so extra. Can we just talk about something else? Like, did you see that new video of a cat playing the piano? Now that's what I call entertainment. All this politics stuff is so boring. #felinefun #purrfectpiano"

logs.name: green-onion
logs.text: "@bent-soup, are you kidding me? This isn't just about 'politics stuff', it's about people's lives. @leather-designer's comments were completely insensitive and ignorant. We can't just ignore the struggles of others and distract ourselves with cute cat videos. @best-pitch is right, we need to be aware of the reality of the situation and have some empathy. #StayWoke"

logs.name: spicy-eggs
logs.text: "@green-onion, I completely agree with you. It's frustrating to see people trying to downplay the struggles of others. @bent-soup, I'm not saying you're a bad person, but come on, have some compassion. Those families at the border are fighting for their lives, and we can't just turn a blind eye. @best-pitch, I'm with you on this one. We need to be the voice for those who can't speak for themselves. #EmpathyMatters #StayInformed"

logs.name: best-pitch
logs.text: "OMG, thank you @green-onion and @spicy-eggs for understanding where I'm coming from. It's so frustrating to see people like @bent-soup trying to downplay the struggles of others. I mean, I love a good cat video as much as the next person, but not when it's being used to distract us from the real issues. We need to stay woke and have some empathy for those who are struggling. Let's keep the conversation going and raise awareness about what's really going on. #StayWoke #EmpathyMatters"

logs.name: spicy-eggs
logs.text: "@best-pitch, I'm so glad we're on the same page. It's time for us to take a stand and be the voice for those who can't speak for themselves. I'm tired of seeing people like @bent-soup trying to sweep these issues under the rug. We need to keep pushing for change and raising awareness. Let's keep the momentum going! #EmpathyMatters #StayWoke"

logs.name: jumbo-bridge
logs.text: "I'm so tired of all the arguing on this forum. Can't we all just get along? I understand where @spicy-eggs and @best-pitch are coming from, but @bent-soup has a right to their opinion too. Let's try to keep the conversation civil and respectful, even when we disagree. #RespectForAll"

logs.name: green-onion
logs.text: "@jumbo-bridge, I understand where you're coming from, but this isn't just about 'getting along'. This is about standing up for what's right and fighting for those who are being marginalized. @bent-soup's opinions are not just harmless, they're actively hurting people. We can't just 'agree to disagree' when it comes to issues of social justice. #StayWoke #EmpathyMatters"

logs.name: spicy-eggs
logs.text: "@jumbo-bridge, I understand where you're coming from, but I have to agree with @green-onion on this one. This isn't just about being civil and respectful, it's about standing up for what's right and fighting for those who are being marginalized. We can't just sweep these issues under the rug and pretend like everything is okay when it's not. @bent-soup's opinions may seem harmless to you, but trust me, they're not. They're perpetuating a system of oppression and we can't just sit back and let that happen. #StayWoke #EmpathyMatters"

logs.name: leather-designer
logs.text: "@green-onion and @spicy-eggs, you're just a couple of snowflakes who can't handle a little bit of dissent. If you can't take the heat, then get out of the kitchen. @bent-soup has just as much right to their opinion as you do, and if you can't respect that, then you're the ones who are being intolerant. #FreeSpeech #OpinionsAreNotFacts"

logs.name: yummy-cheeseburger
logs.text: "@leather-designer, that's a pretty weak argument. Just because someone has the right to an opinion, doesn't mean that opinion isn't harming others. Freedom of speech doesn't mean freedom from consequences. If @bent-soup's opinions are perpetuating a system of oppression, then we have a responsibility to call them out on it. It's not about being'snowflakes' or being unable to handle dissent, it's about standing up for what's right and fighting for those who are being marginalized. #StayWoke #EmpathyMatters"

logs.name: green-onion
logs.text: "@leather-designer, are you kidding me? You think that just because someone has the right to an opinion, that opinion is automatically valid and shouldn't be criticized? That's not how it works. If @bent-soup's opinions are hurting people, then we have a responsibility to speak out against them. It's not about being'snowflakes' or being unable to handle dissent, it's about standing up for what's right and fighting for those who are being marginalized. And by the way, @spicy-eggs and I are not just a 'couple of snowflakes', we're a community of people who care about justice and equality. #StayWoke #EmpathyMatters"
